name: Blonde Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease a 13 x 9 x 2 inch baking pan.
3. In a bowl, whisk together the flour and baking powder. Add 1/4 teaspoon of salt.
4. In a separate saucepan, melt the butter over low heat. Once melted, remove from heat and stir in the brown sugar until well combined.
5. Beat the eggs and vanilla extract into the butter mixture. Stir in the dry ingredients until just mixed.
6. Fold in the chopped walnuts.
7. Pour the batter evenly into the prepared pan.
8. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Allow the brownies to cool completely before cutting into bars.
10. Makes 48 bars.
